tools.name: start_game
tools.description: Starts a new single-player chess game. The user plays as white, the AI plays as black.

tools.name: user_move
tools.description: Records a move made by the user (playing as white). The move is validated and applied if legal.

tools.name: model_move
tools.description: The AI (playing as black) makes a move. Use this after user_move when it's black's turn.

tools.name: show_game
tools.description: Displays the UI for an existing chess game. Use this to resume or view a game in progress.

tools.name: end_game
tools.description: Ends the current game. User can resign or abandon the game.
